case_title: MELODIE JOHNSON VS. P & S TOWING

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, MELODIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT P & S TOWING $125.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $180.00, COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT DIDN'T COMPLY WITH VEHICLE CODE 22658 BY FAILING TO PROVIDE PLAINITFF DOCUMENTATION OF THE AUTHORITY FOR THE TOW AND THE APPROPRIATE CONTACT NUMBERS FOR SFPD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-04-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT P & S TOWING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2009 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO NOV-19-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $625.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, MELODIE AS TO DEFENDANT P & S TOWING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-12-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT P & S TOWING
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY JOHNSON, MELODIE P & S TOWING
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT P & S TOWING
